title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 166.111 - Liability of director of revenue
text:
166.111.  Liability of director of revenue. — The director of revenue and his sureties shall be responsible on his official bond for the safekeeping of the property or money received under sections 166.061 to 166.121 while the property is in his possession and for its disposition in conformity with section 166.091.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 7-11) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 161.270, A.L. 1961 p. 345)
